e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Software Architect
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Designing rollback netcode and an authoritative server with anti-cheat validation requires system-level architectural decisions that cut across every other layer of the project

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Game Designer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: BladeParry's core identity is its parry/posture combat system — balance across classes, hitbox tuning, and combo design require a dedicated systems designer before any C++ implementation begins

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Studio Producer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: PS5 TRC certification, Steam and Epic store submissions, and multi-platform simultaneous release require a senior producer who understands first-party certification processes and can coordinate across engineering, QA, and platform stakeholders

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Technical Artist
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Motion Matching integration with combat state machines, Niagara VFX budgeting, and Nanite/Lumen optimization for 60 FPS on PS5 all require a UE5-fluent technical artist bridging art and engine performance

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Game Audio Engineer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: MetaSounds is a node-based procedural audio graph system unique to UE5; a game audio engineer with engine-level audio integration experience is needed to wire combat state to adaptive sound output

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: UI Designer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: UMG widget design for a fast-paced arena game demands a UI designer who can deliver legible, low-visual-noise combat HUD components that read clearly at 60+ FPS under motion

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Backend Architect
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Redis session state for in-flight matches, matchmaking queue logic, and the authoritative game server's trusted state model require a backend architect experienced with low-latency, stateful server design

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Database Optimizer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Player progression and match data schemas for a live-service arena game require careful indexing and partitioning strategies to support real-time leaderboard queries and post-match write bursts

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: DevOps Automator
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: AWS GameLift fleet scaling, PS5 SDK build integration in CI, and automated multi-platform packaging pipelines require a DevOps engineer experienced with game build infrastructure

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Security Engineer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: A competitive arena game is a high-value cheating target; server-authoritative validation logic and detection of client-side manipulation must be designed by a security engineer from day one

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Performance Benchmarker
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Explicit 60 FPS targets across three platforms with Lumen global illumination enabled require systematic performance benchmarking against platform-specific hardware budgets throughout development
